mapper.update: update t_shipper_invoice set deleted_flag = #{deletedFlag} where invoice_id = #{invoiceId}

update t_shipper_invoice set deleted_flag = #{deletedFlag} where shipper_id in
#{item}
mapper.select: select * from t_shipper_invoice where shipper_id = #{shipperId} and deleted_flag = #{deletedFlag}
select * from t_shipper_invoice where shipper_id = #{shipperId} and deleted_flag = #{deletedFlag}
